findings.description: The customization example code block in s6 contains five property name suffixes (inputSheetName, mainKey, subKey, unconcernedKeys, outputSheetName) that appear only in the code block and are not represented in s6's hints. An AI searching for these property names would not be routed to s6 via hint matching.
findings.source_evidence: Source environment config customization example lists: systemAccountAuthority.inputSheetName, systemAccountAuthority.converter.mainKey, systemAccountAuthority.converter.subKey, systemAccountAuthority.converter.unconcernedKeys, systemAccountAuthority.writer.outputSheetName
